name: Do I need to rewrite all my content for GEO, or can I update what I already have?
description: Most teams can update existing content instead of rewriting everything. Focus on structure, clarity, evidence, and schema first.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to rewrite all my content for GEO, or can I update what I already have?

acceptedAnswer.text: You usually do not need a full rewrite. Most GEO improvements come from restructuring existing content so AI systems can parse it more easily, adding concise answers, strengthening evidence, and improving schema. A full rewrite is only needed when the page is too thin, outdated, or off-topic for the query it is meant to answer.
acceptedAnswer.description: Most teams can update existing content instead of rewriting everything. Focus on structure, clarity, evidence, and schema first.
